descriptionTemplate: Gain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. Discard Symptom and State Cards from your hand, shuffle the other cards in your hand into the Draw Pile, then draw the same number of cards. {Leap}: Refund the Arithmetica Cost of {Poof!}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. Discard Symptom and State Cards from your hand, shuffle the remaining cards in your hand into the Draw Pile, then draw a number of cards equal to the quantity discarded and shuffled, gaining [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus per card drawn. {Leap}: Refund the Arithmetica Cost of '{Poof!}'.
